title: kolm.yaml project file, v0.1
description: Schema for the kolm.yaml project file. A kolm.yaml lives at the repo root and declares which .kolm artifacts belong to the project, how MCP exposes them, how the benchmark harness runs, and which compile/run hooks fire. Mirrors the role of Continue's config.yaml or Cursor's .cursorrules: one declarative file, not many imperative steps.

kolm_yaml_version.description: Schema version this kolm.yaml conforms to.

name.description: Project name. Lowercase alnum + dash/underscore. Used as the namespace prefix in MCP tool names: mcp__<name>__<artifact>.

description.description: One-line project description. Surfaces in MCP tool listings and SKILL.md.

path.description: Path (relative to kolm.yaml) of the .kolm artifact, or a directory of .kolm artifacts, or a glob (e.g. ./artifacts/*.kolm).

name.description: Stable identifier used as the MCP tool name and the SKILL.md filename.

description.description: Tool description seen by frontier agents. Frontier model picks tool by description; be specific. Defaults to the artifact's manifest.task on emit.

allowed-tools.description: MCP tool names this artifact may invoke when running as a sub-agent. Default: empty (no further tool calls). Matches Claude Code SKILL.md frontmatter.

paths.description: Glob patterns. When set, harnesses auto-attach this artifact when the user/agent is editing matching files (Cursor + Claude Code pattern).

k_min.description: Minimum K-score required to expose this artifact via MCP. Reject below this floor at serve time.

port.description: Port for http/sse transports. Ignored on stdio.

host.description: Host for http/sse. Default 127.0.0.1; never default to 0.0.0.0.

suite.description: Reproducer suite id (e.g. swebench-lite-n150). Resolved against the kolm public registry.

model.description: Frontier model used for the Pass 2 / REM-injected arm (e.g. claude-opus-4-7-20251225).

hooks.description: Map of event name to list of script paths (relative to kolm.yaml). Events: PreCompile, PostCompile, PreRun, PostRun, PreBench, PostBench. Each script receives a JSON event on stdin; exit code 0 = allow, 2 = block. Stdout JSON may modify the event (additionalContext, updatedInput).

skills_dir.description: Where kolm compile writes SKILL.md sidecars. Convention: ./.kolm/skills emits one SKILL.md per artifact; harnesses (Claude Code, Cursor, Cline, Continue) index this directory.

registry.description: Registry base URL. Override for self-hosted or staging.
